name: octo-apm-checkout-end-to-end
description: Trace Explorer query for checkout, payment, Java sidecar, and CRM order-sync traces. Use the TraceId column to pivot into Log Analytics checkout-payment-correlation.
queryText: show (traces) TraceStatus as Status, TraceFirstSpanStartTime as "Start Time", TraceId, ServiceName as Service, OperationName as Operation, TraceDuration as Duration, span_summary() as Spans, ErrorCount as "Span Errors" where ServiceName in ('octo-drone-shop','octo-drone-shop-oke','enterprise-crm-portal','enterprise-crm-portal-oke','octo-java-app-server','octo-java-app-server-oke') and (OperationName like '%orders%' or OperationName like '%checkout%' or OperationName like '%payment%' or OperationName like '%sync%')
